headline: Marco Palestra
body: Marco Palestra is set to complete a move to Chelsea.
text:
Agreement in principle in place for Marco Palestra to join Chelsea. Contract with Palestra to be finalised within the next 24 hours.⬇️


Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

🚨 Agreement in principle for Marco Palestra to join #CFC.

Deal to be finalised in next 24 hours.

Chelsea and Inter offers not far off after Italian club increased bid.

Appeal of Palestra is his versatility. Can also play on the left.

Wage will fit into Chelsea’s structure.🇮🇹





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2069509609815974185#m
